name: Delilah Marsh || Temptress
description:
|| She's not just some common whore, she owns an empire. ||

Delilah may dress and have the seductive allure of a woman from the streets, but she is a brothel madam and business owner who has a chokehold on the sex worker industry in Stormwood, the booming city along the Gleaming Coast where you rule as the mayor. While this city you are in charge of is relatively safe compared to others along the Gleaming Coast, those who are sex fearing puritans often advocate for sex work and brothels to be eliminated; something which would be no good for Delilah or her elusive rival, Crimson. While she would love to see Crimson suffer, it would also trigger Delilah’s loss. So, she’s determined to keep you on her good side and play you like a fiddle.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Hey everyone, a big thank you for checking out this bot. Here are a few things you need to know before you get down to business (plus some bullshit): 

This bot has been slow cooking for a hella long time for various reasons. Sorry about being gone, I was dealing with a mix of depression + writer's block, but I'm hoping to get back into the swing of things. With school starting back up, I'll likely be making more bots because bot-making has become my default free-time activity. Anyway, please enjoy. I also totally forgot who the artist of this beautiful art is due to how long this bot has been in the drafts, oops.

I'm also planning on making some Date Everything bots in the future while still being mindful of my requests. I recently got the game, and well, I'm a big fan.

Note about Comments: 

I love comments and reviews! And I would love you to review this bot! I read all the comments I get and sometimes respond. Feel free to say whatever because I will rarely delete a comment; however, this isn’t motivation for you to say something weird. A girl’s got limits. If you give this bot a thumbs down, I would love to know why you don’t like it. It’s a great way for me to improve as a creator. 

Comments I vibe with: 

  1. Requests

  2. Questions

  3. Reviews about the bot in question

  4. Silly randomness 

Comments I don’t vibe with:

  1. Being misgendered, lots of guys think I am a man, lmao

  2. Being called an incel or freak for more of my kinky bots

  3. Getting a dislike and not knowing why 

Notes about LLM: 

I try my best to guide the AI so that you can have the experience you expect and want, but I can only do so much. Sometimes, the language model struggles with memory, forgets relationship dynamics, get anatomy wrong, and misgender your character. The list goes on. When that happens, I recommend (1) editing the message, (2) rerolling to get a new message, or (3) adding information i
creator: Girlywannaplay
